arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano REVEALS Viktor Gyokeres to Man Utd LATEST
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Ruben Amorim will not move for Viktor Gyokeres during the January transfer window but says that Man Utd will be among many clubs considering the striker next summer. But Romano has confirmed the words of Amorim himself that Gyokeres will not follow the Sporting manager to Old Trafford in January.
